prerequisites.value: Over the course of at least five different occasions, free a cumulative total of 50+ sentient beings held in unjust captivity.

description.value: **Benefit:** When in combat with an opponent that you know owns or trades in slaves, once per round you may add a bonus to damage rolls for a melee attack, ranged attack, or targeted spell against that opponent. This bonus damage is +1 for every four Hit Dice you have.
